modules.purpose: Root directory containing Flask server and Jupyter notebooks for RAG chatbot

files.purpose: Flask web server providing /ask API endpoint and serving chat UI
Python dependencies: Flask, OpenAI, FAISS, pandas, numpy, gradio, git-lfs
Project documentation describing RAG chatbot architecture and usage
Excel file containing UTD website URLs to scrape

modules.purpose: HTML templates for Flask web UI

files.purpose: Chat interface HTML with UTD orange branding, message bubbles, and /ask API integration

modules.purpose: Jupyter notebooks for data pipeline (scraping, chunking, embedding)

files.purpose: Notebook to batch-embed text chunks using OpenAI text-embedding-ada-002 and build FAISS index
Notebook to async scrape 4600+ UTD pages, extract text, filter noise, and create chunks
